Request a Demo

Certified Threat Intelligence Analyst

Threat Intelligence enables Businesses to provide the best possible defense against the most probable threats. This course introduces attendees with the basics concepts of Threat Intelligence and take them thru the entire process of setting up a Threat Intel Platform using MISP to consume all the intelligence from around 80+ global community feeds and also enables the attendees to share intelligence on malwares and attacks back to the community.

Enroll nowDownload Brochure
Birds Eye View

Course Objective

Threat Intelligence enables Businesses to provide the best possible defense against the most probable threats. This course introduces attendees with the basics concepts of Threat Intelligence and take them thru the entire process of setting up a Threat Intel Platform using MISP to consume all the intelligence from around 80+ global community feeds and also enables the attendees to share intelligence on malwares and attacks back to the community.

Gain in-depth knowledge of security threats, attacks, vulnerabilities, attacker’s behaviors, cyber kill chain, SOC processes, procedures, technologies, and automation workflows
Understand the MITRE ATT&CK Framework and Able to identify attacker techniques, tactics, and procedures (TTP) to investigate on indicators of compromise (IOCs) and provide automated / manual responses to eliminate the attack/incident
Able to understand the concepts of Threat Intelligence and gain in-depth knowledge on how to integrate Threat Intelligence with the SIEM, SOAR, EDR and other SOC technologies to reduce the Mean time to Detect (MTTD) and Mean time to Respond (MTTR)
Able to Understand and learn how to setup a Threat Intelligence Framework and platform for your organization and consume community and commercial feeds to understand attacks and defend your organization from future attacks
Gain in-depth knowledge on Malware Information Sharing Platform (MISP) and learn to setup a working instance with configurations and integrations that can be used immediately in your organisation
Gain knowledge of Incident Response Methodology, processes and in-depth knowledge on how to integrate Threat Intelligence processes with Incident Response processes using HIVE and learn how to automate them as a single workflow
Overview

What You'll Learn

Explore a complete suite of cybersecurity services designed to protect, detect, and respond to modern threats across your organization.

Duration
5 Days
Industry Certifications

Examination Platforms

Validate your cyber threat intelligence expertise through industry-recognized certifications designed to assess practical threat analysis and adversary profiling capabilities.

Certified Threat Intelligence Analyst

The Certified Threat Intelligence Analyst certification by GlobalACE validates your ability to consume, analyze, and apply threat intelligence to defend organizations, aligned with international standards.

Exam Structure: MCQ, practical assessments, assignments, and case studies
Assessment Areas: Knowledge, skills, and real-world security practices
Exam Availability: Authorized examination centers worldwide
Membership Benefit: Eligible for GlobalACE professional membership
Free Add-on: CYBERTRON Cybersecurity Collaboration & Skills Validation Platform access

Certified Threat Intelligence Analyst

The Certified Threat Intelligence Analyst certification by Cybertronium focuses on practical skills in analyzing attack lifecycles, mapping to MITRE ATT&CK, and utilizing Threat Intelligence platforms.

Exam Platform: CYBERTRON
Exam Format: 50 Multiple Choice Questions (MCQ)
Exam Duration: 90 Minutes
Passing Score: 70% minimum required
Exam Fees: Included within course fees
Free Add-on: CYBERTRON Cybersecurity Collaboration & Skills Validation Platform access

More Like This

Related Courses

Expand your cybersecurity expertise with advanced training programs designed to strengthen offensive security, defensive operations, cloud security, and real-world threat management skills.

Certified Security Operation Center (SOC) Analyst

A security operations centre (SOC) is a facility operating 24 x 7 x 365, where enterprise information systems (data centres, servers, networks, desktops and other endpoints) are monitored, assessed, and defended around the clock. SOC Analysts are the backbone for the operations of a SOC. This course prepares you to be ready for the real-world challenges of a SOC Analyst.

Duration
5 Days
